test.command: pnpm -C packages/shared exec vitest run src/delivery-loop/domain/failure-signature.test.ts src/delivery-loop/store/dispatch-intent-store.test.ts && pnpm -C apps/www exec vitest run src/server-lib/delivery-loop/v3/reducer.test.ts src/server-lib/delivery-loop/v3/process-effects.test.ts src/app/api/daemon-event/route.test.ts && pnpm -C apps/www exec vitest run src/server-lib/e2e.test.ts
test.summary: 52 tests passed (shared) + 376 tests passed (delivery-loop unit/integration) + 20 tests passed (e2e)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit cross-reference to BroadcastThreadShellRealtimeFieldsSchema in the delivery loop status projection section. The schema defines canonical field names (prStatus, githubPRNumber, prChecksStatus) that must be used consistently across the UI projection layer to avoid type regressions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature m5-lock-end-to-end-lifecycle-contract fixed field name mismatches (status->prStatus, prNumber->githubPRNumber). The BroadcastThreadShellRealtimeFieldsSchema exists in the types package but isn't explicitly referenced in AGENTS.md architecture documentation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the query helper pattern in server-action-helpers.ts which provides getServerActionQueryOptions for type-safe server action queries with TanStack Query. This is a well-established pattern used throughout the codebase.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature m5-harden-ui-status-projection uses this pattern consistently. Multiple features have used this pattern, indicating it's a stable convention that should be documented.

rejectedObservations.observation: The worker skill 'delivery-loop-runtime-worker' referenced in the transcript does not exist at .factory/skills/delivery-loop-runtime-worker/SKILL.md
Delivery loop status tests are split across three files following a logical separation pattern

m5-harden-ui-status-projection.summary: Successfully implements adaptive polling intervals (15s active, 30s blocked, 60s terminal, 120s initial) and enhanced patch-based refresh detection. 27 tests covering all UI contract assertions.

m5-lock-end-to-end-lifecycle-contract.summary: Fixed TypeScript field name mismatches in delivery-loop-status.ts (status->prStatus, prNumber->githubPRNumber). E2E test suite passed (20 tests). Clean, minimal fix.
